params.SpellDescription: Discover X, where X is the mana value of the exiled card. Activate only as a sorcery. (Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with that mana value or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)
params.StackDescription: {p:You} discovers X, where X is the mana value of the exiled card.
